---
title: "Delay Predictions"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## 

---
title: "Airline Delay Prediction"
author: "Aishani Pradhan, Avery Wang"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Reading the Data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(slider)
library(rsample)
library(pROC)
```

```{r}
# Read data
flights2023 <- read_csv("data/flights2023.csv")
flights2024 <- read_csv("data/flights2024.csv")
flights2025 <- read_csv("data/flights2025_visible.csv")

# Combine
flights <- rbind(flights2023, flights2024, flights2025)

# Keep only departing PIT flights if arrivals are included
# Remove cancelled and diverted flights
flights <- flights %>%
  filter(ORIGIN == "PIT",
         CANCELLED == 0,
         DIVERTED == 0)
```

```{r}
head(flights)
```

## Feature Engineering

```{r}
# Quarters redefined
flights <- flights |>
  mutate(SEASON = case_when(
    MONTH %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
    MONTH %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
    MONTH %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
    MONTH %in% c(9, 10, 11) ~ "Fall"
  ))
```

```{r}
# Hours since midnight (time block as numerical because eda showed increase)
flights <- flights |>
  mutate(DEP_HOUR = CRS_DEP_TIME %/% 100,
         DEP_MIN = CRS_DEP_TIME %% 100,
         DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT = DEP_HOUR + DEP_MIN / 60)
```

```{r}
# Sort once in chronological order
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME)

# Historical carrier delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    carrier_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier delay rate within the same day
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_day_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    carrier_day_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_day_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-route delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_route_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    carrier_route_delay_rate =
      if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_route_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical destination delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    dest_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    dest_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, dest_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-month delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, MONTH) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_month_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    carrier_month_delay_rate =
      if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_month_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical late-aircraft delay rate for each carrier-flight number pair
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, OP_CARRIER_FL_NUM) %>%
  mutate(
    flightnum_late_aircraft_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(LATE_AIRCRAFT_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    flightnum_late_aircraft_delay_rate =
      if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, flightnum_late_aircraft_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    weather_event = as.integer(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(WEATHER_DELAY, 0) > 0),

    weather_delay_rate_3hr = slide_dbl(
      seq_along(CRS_DEP_TIME),
      .f = ~{
        current_time <- CRS_DEP_TIME[.x[length(.x)]]

        # Earlier flights within the past 3 hours (300 in HHMM format is not correct,
        # so convert to minutes)
        current_min <- (current_time %/% 100) * 60 + current_time %% 100

        prior_idx <- .x[
          ((CRS_DEP_TIME[.x] %/% 100) * 60 + CRS_DEP_TIME[.x] %% 100) >= current_min - 180 &
          ((CRS_DEP_TIME[.x] %/% 100) * 60 + CRS_DEP_TIME[.x] %% 100) < current_min
        ]

        if (length(prior_idx) == 0) {
          0
        } else {
          mean(weather_event[prior_idx], na.rm = TRUE)
        }
      },
      .before = Inf
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
#long weekend
flights <- flights %>%
  mutate(
    weekend_group = case_when(
      DAY_OF_WEEK %in% c(5, 6, 7, 1) ~ "Fri-Mon",
      DAY_OF_WEEK %in% c(2, 3, 4) ~ "Tue-Thu"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(weekend_group) %>%
  mutate(
    long_weekend_delay_rate =
      mean(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
head(flights)
```

## Filtering

```{r}
flights_model <- flights %>%
  select(
    YEAR,
    SEASON,
    DEST_STATE_ABR,
    DISTANCE,
    DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
    carrier_delay_rate,
    carrier_day_delay_rate,
    carrier_route_delay_rate,
    dest_delay_rate,
    carrier_month_delay_rate,
    flightnum_late_aircraft_delay_rate,
    weather_delay_rate_3hr,
    long_weekend_delay_rate,
    DEP_DEL15
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    SEASON = as.factor(SEASON),
    DEST_STATE_ABR = as.factor(DEST_STATE_ABR),
    DEP_DEL15 = as.factor(DEP_DEL15)
  )
```

## Train Test Split

```{r}
# Stratified split within each year, using DEP_DEL15
split_2023 <- initial_split(
  filter(flights_model, YEAR == 2023),
  prop = 0.8,
  strata = DEP_DEL15
)

split_2024 <- initial_split(
  filter(flights_model, YEAR == 2024),
  prop = 0.8,
  strata = DEP_DEL15
)

split_2025 <- initial_split(
  filter(flights_model, YEAR == 2025),
  prop = 0.8,
  strata = DEP_DEL15
)

# Combine the train and test sets from each year
train_data <- bind_rows(
  training(split_2023),
  training(split_2024),
  training(split_2025)
)

test_data <- bind_rows(
  testing(split_2023),
  testing(split_2024),
  testing(split_2025)
)
```

## Logistic Regression - aishani

```{r}
logit_model <- glm(
  DEP_DEL15 ~ . - YEAR,
  data = train_data,
  family = binomial()
)
```

```{r}
predictions_2025 <- predict(
  logit_model,
  newdata = test_data,
  type = "response"
)
```

```{r}
pred_class <- ifelse(predictions_2025 >= 0.5, 1, 0)
```

```{r}
classification_rate <- mean(
  pred_class == test_data$DEP_DEL15
)

misclassification_error <- 1 - classification_rate

classification_rate
misclassification_error
```

```{r}
auc_obj <- roc(
  response = test_data$DEP_DEL15,
  predictor = predictions_2025
)

auc(auc_obj)
```

## Logistic Regression with Lasso - aishani

throw everything here

## Random Forest - avery

## Boosting - avery

## SVM? - avery

## Neural Nets – if everything sucks - aishani
